title: Thingamajigs
description: Adds thingamajigs, which are various decorations and blocks.
body:
Welcome to Thingamajigs!

Ever wanted decorations in your Minecraft world such as tables, arcade machines, lightbulbs, more variants of vanilla blocks, traffic lights and more? Then you have come across the mod you are looking for.

This mod adds more furniture, appliances, lighting fixtures, toys, outdoor decorations, and more vanilla block variants (there is over 100+ unique decorations in this mod, each with their own category). This mod is for the *NeoForge* environment only. Some versions are added here for convenience (Forge versions). Need some help or want to know how to craft something? Check out the docs: https://bonincreativemedia.gitbook.io/thingamajigs-docs/ Want to see progress on the mod and new features upcoming or report bugs? Visit the GitHub page: Official Thingamajigs GitHub Link <-- Want To Support the mod Directly? See the left sidebar for a direct link (Uses PayPal). _Build a city! A mall! Or even just build your dream home..._ "I personally hope you enjoy this mod." - CMB, creator of mod [![](https://markdown-videos-api.jorgenkh.no/youtube/juTMsDiTybQ)](https://youtu.be/juTMsDiTybQ) [![](https://markdown-videos-api.jorgenkh.no/youtube/havk5MmogaM)](https://youtu.be/havk5MmogaM) Alpha, Pre-release and other versions exist for testing here: GitHub Downloads Thingamajigs 2: [Thingamajigs 2 GitHub Link ->](https://github.com/roberttkahelin8/thingamajigs2/tree/main)
